Tested through CL's Quality Certification Program prior to, or after initial posting of this Product Review.
- Canadian product.

* Key ingredient on which cost analysis is based is indicated in brackets in the first row of each section. Cost analyses provided only for single ingredient products. For glucosamine supplements, analyses based on 1,500 mg of glucosamine HCl or equivalent amount of glucosamine from N-acetyl-D-glucosamine (which provides about 97.4% of the glucosamine as the HCl form, as noted in ConsumerTips™).

NA - Not applicable

1 Products were tested for lead, cadmium and arsenic if they contain any whole herbs and/or 250 mg or more minerals daily OR tested for only lead if contained glucosamine and/or non-bovine sourced chondroitin (such as from shellfish).
2 Only products that contain MSM were tested for DMSO.
3 Not tested but claimed on label.
4 AprèsFlex® contains 20% AKBA, according to the distributor PLT Health Solutions (communicated by phone).  
5 5-Loxin® Advanced contains 30% AKBA, according to the distributor, PLT Health Solutions.
6 The United States Pharmacopeia (USP) states that a resin of Boswellia serrata must contain a minimum of 1% (wt/wt) of the sum of KBA and AKBA.
7 The United States Pharmacopeia (USP) states that an extract of Boswellia serrata must contain a minimum of 6% (wt/wt) of the sum of KBA and AKBA.
Unless otherwise noted, information about the products listed above is based on the samples purchased by ConsumerLab.com (CL) for this Product Review. Manufacturers may change ingredients and label information at any time, so be sure to check labels carefully when evaluating the products you use or buy. If a product's ingredients differ from what is listed above, it may not necessarily be of the same quality as what was tested.

The information contained in this report is based on the compilation and review of information from product labeling and analytic testing. CL applies what it believes to be the most appropriate testing methods and standards. The information in this report does not reflect the opinion or recommendation of CL, its officers or employees. CL cannot assure the accuracy of information.
